chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail Application No.S-149 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of bail application ---- Mr. Irshad Hussain Dharejo, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Addl. P.G ---- Date of hearing: 08.04.2019 Date of order: 08.04.2019 O R D E R ZAFAR AHMED RAJPUT, J:- Through instant Criminal Pre-arrest Bail Application, applicant Attaullah son of Fateh Ali Chang has sought pre- arrest bail in Crime No.138/2017, registered at Police Station Faiz Gunj, under sections 334, 337-H, 147, 148, 149 PPC. His earlier application for grant of pre-arrest bail bearing No.2263/2017 was heard and dismissed by the learned Additional Sessions-I, Khairpur vide order dated 22.09.2017. He was admitted to ad-interim pre-arrest bail by this court vide order dated 01.03.2019, now the matter is fixed for confirmation of ad-interim pre-arrest bail or otherwise. 2. The complainant Sajid Ali is present and filed affidavit to the effect that the Faisla has been held between applicant and him in which they have patched up, hence he has no objection for the confirmation of ad- interim pre-arrest bail granted to applicant/accused. 3. Learned Addl. P.G states that since the alleged offence is compoundable and the parties are likely to file proper application u/s 345 Cr.P.C before the court concerned and the parties have patched up, he records his no objection for confirmation of ad-interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant. 4. Accordingly, the ad-interim pre-arrest bail granted to applicant/accused vide order dated 01.03.2019, is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions.

P.G states that since the alleged offence is compoundable and the parties are likely to file proper application u/s 345 Cr.P.C before the court concerned and the parties have patched up, he records his no objection for confirmation of ad-interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant. 4. Accordingly, the ad-interim pre-arrest bail granted to applicant/accused vide order dated 01.03.2019, is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
